# Lambda Powertools Reference

> Production-grade AWS CDK reference architecture for Lambda + Powertools
> serverless applications: three-stack CDK composition (WAF / backend /
> frontend) behind a cdk.Stage, five-rule-pack cdk-nag gating on every synth,
> end-to-end customer-managed-key encryption, WAF + CloudFront, CloudTrail
> object-level data events, browser RUM with X-Ray correlation, Athena
> access-log analytics, and supply-chain hygiene (pinned everything, grouped
> Dependabot with cooldowns, pip-audit, CodeQL, Scorecard).

Key facts for agents working in this repo:

- Two Python venvs exist because CDK and Powertools require incompatible
  `attrs` versions: `.venv` (CDK side) and `.venv-lambda` (runtime side).
  Never mix them. `make install` provisions both plus node tooling.
- `cdk synth`/`deploy`/`destroy` MUST use the `'**'` glob — the stacks are
  nested in a cdk.Stage and bare invocations silently do nothing.
- The CDK CLI is pinned in package.json and invoked via `npx cdk`.
- `docs/openapi.json` is committed and CI-gated; regenerate with `make openapi`
  after touching routes or models.
- `make pr` runs every CI gate locally. `make help` lists all targets.
- Deployment environments: default `prod` keeps legacy stack names;
  `make deploy ENV=<name>` creates a namespaced ephemeral copy.

## Documentation

- [README](README.md): architecture, deploy/destroy runbooks, quality gates,
  release recipe, design decisions and known limitations
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): condensed agent-facing project rules (venv split,
  synth glob, nag-gate workflow, encryption posture, commit grammar)
- [TODO](TODO.md): production-readiness checklist for forks
- [CHANGELOG](CHANGELOG.md): generated by git-cliff from Conventional Commits

## Source

- [lambda/app.py](lambda/app.py): the Lambda handler — Powertools logger,
  tracer, metrics, idempotency, feature flags, validated env vars, OpenAPI
- [hello_world/hello_world_app.py](hello_world/hello_world_app.py): the main
  application construct (KMS, DynamoDB, SSM, AppConfig, Lambda, API Gateway,
  regional WAF, monitoring + alarms)
- [hello_world/hello_world_stage.py](hello_world/hello_world_stage.py): the
  Stage grouping all three stacks; environment naming lives here
- [hello_world/nag_utils.py](hello_world/nag_utils.py): shared cdk-nag aspects
  and confused-deputy-guarded KMS service grants
- [tests/](tests/): unit (100% coverage gate), CDK assertions + in-process
  cdk-nag gate, live integration tests
